title: juncus lancangensis
intro: Juncus lancangensis is a type of aquatic plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Juncus lancangensis include its potential in treating various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Juncus lancangensis is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its dried rhizomes are used to make herbal teas or tonics.
